description: The Router component renders Landing page for SignedOut users and AuthenticatedApp for SignedIn users, but there's no route transition handling. If a user signs in/out, React doesn't unmount/remount the router cleanly, which could cause stale state. Should add key prop to force remount on auth state change.
successCriteria: Router component has a key prop derived from Clerk auth state
Sign in/out triggers full router remount to clear stale state
No residual data from previous user session persists after sign out
